title: Portfolio Case Studies and Technical Decision Narratives · Career Evidence Triage
summary: A realistic portfolio case studies and technical decision narratives artifact contains one plausible targeting, evidence, integrity, access, privacy, process, or decision defect. Locate the first unsupported claim before revising it. Planned artifact: Repair a changed failure in evidence-linked project case-study set and publish the reproduction, evidence, repair, and regression record. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence…
objectives: Explain the affected people, decision, evidence, constraints, prior alternative, and personal authority without inventing user research.
Present important alternatives, tradeoffs, revision triggers, and the learner-owned technical decisions rather than a tool inventory.
Show a reproduced failure, competing hypotheses, causal repair, regression evidence, and what the repair did not prove.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.config:
# job-search cumulative learner-controlled career campaign
# Browser labs review fictional evidence contracts only. They never contact people,
# submit applications, access accounts, expose personal data, negotiate, or accept offers.
workspace: career
candidate-id: fictional-learner
target-role: [replace with role family, work outcomes, and bounded level]
jurisdiction: [replace with location and current official guidance boundary]
audience: [replace with reviewer need, time, format, and access context]
claim: [replace with one truthful role-relevant behavior claim]
evidence: [replace with revision, artifact, observation, changed case, contribution, and limit]
process-state: [replace with discover, investigate, apply, interview, offer, close, or archive]
accessibility: [replace with keyboard, structure, reflow, status, alternatives, and human review]
privacy-consent: [replace with purpose, minimization, permission, retention, deletion, and safe contact]
decision: [replace with learner-owned next decision and stop rule]
transfer-boundary: learner-approved external actions only
review:

steps.title: Inspect the failure record · Debug Problem Context
steps.instruction:
debug case — A polished project story lists features and tools but invents user impact, hides failures, and links no accessibility, security, changed-case, or operations evidence. The debug variation 4 changes the candidate background, target role, jurisdiction, access need, source date, process state, and decision constraint. Competency probe: Explain the affected people, decision, evidence, constraints, prior alternative, and personal authority without inventing user research.

Inspect the Problem Context trace for this debug case. Which record connects a precondition, observed state change, and boundary result?

Evidence target: Inspect the failure record · Debug Problem Context.
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for explain the affected people, decision, evidence, constraints, prior alternative, and personal authority without inventing user research. For Inspect the failure record · Debug Problem Context, keep Problem Context connected to mechanically reviewable target-role, truthful-claim, contribution, accessibility, privacy, consent, process-state, changed-candidate, failure, repair, decision, and transfer evidence.

content.text: For Problem Context, distinguish a claim from evidence by locating the relevant precondition, trace or invariant, and changed input result.

hints: For Inspect the failure record · Debug Problem Context, name the learner goal, target role, jurisdiction, audience, truthful claim, contribution, source date, evidence revision, accessibility, privacy, consent, process state, decision owner, non-claim, and transfer boundary, Problem Context precondition, or invariant that must hold.

At Inspect the failure record · Debug Problem Context, trace this concrete input and predict targeting, source, evidence, contribution, access, privacy, consent, process, decision, rejection, repair, follow-up, and learner-controlled transfer evidence before reviewing it: A polished project story lists features and tools but invents user impact, hides failures, and links no accessibility, security, changed-case, or operations evidence. The debug variation 4 changes the candidate background, target role, jurisdiction, access need, source date, process state, and decision constraint. Competency probe: Explain the affected people, decision, evidence, constraints, prior alternative, and personal authority without inventing user research.

For Inspect the failure record · Debug Problem Context, challenge the documented misconception with changed-candidate, target-role, source-date, jurisdiction, audience, access, privacy, consent, process-state, interview, offer, rejection, repair, and learner-controlled transfer evidence: A compelling case study needs a dramatic origin story even if none occurred.

stimulus.title: Problem Context case record
stimulus.caption: Three excerpts from a learner evidence packet; only one connects a claim to a reproducible check.

lines.label: assumption
lines.text: A polished project story lists features and tools but invents user impact, hides failures, and links no accessibility, security, changed-case, or operations evidence. The debug variation 4 changes the candidate background, target role, jurisdiction, access need, source date, process state, and decision constraint. Competency probe: Explain the affected people, decision, evidence, constraints, prior alternative, and personal authority without inventing user research.

lines.label: risk
lines.text: A compelling case study needs a dramatic origin story even if none occurred.

lines.label: evidence
lines.text: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Explain the affected people, decision, evidence, constraints, prior alternative, and personal authority without inventing user research. Artifact under review: evidence-linked project case-study set.

options.text: For inspect the failure record, apply Problem Context without its stated preconditions, omit the evidence-linked project case-study set trace and counterexample, and treat one plausible output as complete proof. This does not satisfy Problem Context for evidence-linked project case-study set.
The record names the assumption, applies Problem Context, and reports a changed-case check tied to the stakeholder decision.

The Problem Context record says evidence-linked project case-study set looks right but supplies no governing condition, observation, changed case, or counterexample. That claim fails the inspect the failure record evidence boundary for Problem Context.

steps.title: Implement the cause-level repair · Debug Case Study Access
steps.instruction:
Append a career-case-study-access-95adf8: manifest entry with concrete verify plus failure, owner, or repair evidence.

Evidence target: Implement the cause-level repair · Debug Case Study Access.
steps.why: Building a runnable or mechanically reviewable artifact turns Case Study Access into observable performance evidence. For Implement the cause-level repair · Debug Case Study Access, keep Case Study Access connected to mechanically reviewable target-role, truthful-claim, contribution, accessibility, privacy, consent, process-state, changed-candidate, failure, repair, decision, and transfer evidence.

content.code:
career-case-study-access-95adf8:
  verify: [replace with a deterministic check]
  failure: [replace with the rejected condition]
  repair: [replace with a local reproduction and correction path]
content.caption: Shape of the required increment; replace generic language with the current stakeholder case.

content.title: Evidence is more than syntax
content.text: The Case Study Access structural check is only one gate. evidence-linked project case-study set must also survive the stated changed case and causal explanation.

hints: For Implement the cause-level repair · Debug Case Study Access, name the learner goal, target role, jurisdiction, audience, truthful claim, contribution, source date, evidence revision, accessibility, privacy, consent, process state, decision owner, non-claim, and transfer boundary, Case Study Access precondition, or invariant that must hold.

The debug variation 5 changes the candidate background, target role, jurisdiction, access need, source date, process state, and decision constraint. Competency probe: Provide keyboard-operable, reflowing, structured, concise, low-motion, text-equivalent case evidence with a usable offline alternative.

For Implement the cause-level repair · Debug Case Study Access, challenge the documented misconception with changed-candidate, target-role, source-date, jurisdiction, audience, access, privacy, consent, process-state, interview, offer, rejection, repair, and learner-controlled transfer evidence: Portfolio accessibility matters only for design roles.
